# type

**Instance Property**

The type of rental car the user reserved.

## Declaration

```swift
var type: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

This property typically contains a string that describes the type of rental car reserved as defined by the rental car company, such as “Economy Class” or “Compact”.

## Getting the Rental Car Information

- **rentalCompanyName**: The name of the rental car company.
- **make**: The name of the company that made the rental car.
- **model**: The name of the rental car model.
- **rentalCarDescription**: A description of the rental car.
